summary: Safety claims such as non-toxic, child-safe, or side-effect-free must not contradict known product risks or label warnings.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Non-toxic, side-effect-free, child-safe, or zero-risk safety claims. ACTION: REJECT — align with label warnings and known risks. CHECK: Contraindications, age restrictions, and hazard pictograms. ESCALATE IF: Claim contradicts HSA label or pharmacovigilance data.
